center.name: Elliott Coues
center.summary: Elliott Coues是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括美洲银鸥、Bendire's thrasher、Lawrence's thrush，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Bendire's thrasher (Toxostoma bendirei) is a medium-sized species of thrasher native to the southwestern United States and northwestern Mexico

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Lawrence's thrush (Turdus lawrencii) is a species of bird in the family Turdidae. It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia, Ecuador, Peru, and Venezuela.Remsen, J
